rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors for description and type. Confirmed by visual inspection.

rows.description: Soluta Varia. — Brought up
rows.notes: Amounts are in full consensus and visually verified. Description from gpt-5-mini ('Soluta Varia. — Brought up') is more accurate compared to gemini-flash's 'Solida Iana. Brought up', confirmed by visual inspection.

rows.description: To the City of Oxford for renewal of two leases of the Tenements at the Back Gate in Broad St. (now converted into the New Buildings) for 40 years from Lady Day, 1825.
rows.notes: Amounts and row type are in consensus. Description from gpt-5-mini is more accurate with 'leases' (lowercase) and 'Buildings' (plural), visually confirmed. gemini-flash had 'Leases' and 'Building'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the City of Oxford to renew two leases of the tenements at the Back Gate in Broad Street for a 40-year term commencing Lady Day 1825.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the City of Oxford to renew two leases of the tenements at the Back Gate in Broad Street for a 40-year term from Lady Day 1825; amount not stated.

rows.description: Fine
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors and visually verified.
rows.english_description: Fine paid in connection with the renewal of the two leases of the tenements at the Back Gate in Broad Street.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fine paid for the lease renewals, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.description: Interest for lapse of 7 years
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors and visually verified.
rows.english_description: Interest paid relating to a lapse covering seven years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Interest paid for a lapse of seven years, amounting to £7 0s 0d.

rows.description: Fees
rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors and visually verified.
rows.english_description: Fees paid (likely legal or administrative fees connected with the lease renewals and associated business).

rows.notes: Consensus across both extractors and visually verified as a subtotal (indicated by the brace). Summation check confirms correctness (20.0.0 + 7.0.0 + 16.13.6 = 43.13.6).

rows.description: To Mr Poole of Tintinhull for a valuation of Napier's Dilapidations
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description combines the best readings from both extractors, confirmed by visual inspection: 'Tintinhull' from gpt-5-mini and 'Dilapidations' from gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Poole of Tintinhull for a valuation of Napier's dilapidations.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Poole of Tintinhull for valuing Napier's dilapidations, amounting to £3 13s 1d.

rows.description: - Do. Gratuity (to his Son) for 5 yr Agency
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description combines the best readings from both extractors, confirmed by visual inspection: leading dash and 'Gratuity (to his Son)' from gemini-flash, and '5 yr Agency' (not '5 7/4" Agency') from gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Gratuity paid to the son of Mr Poole as remuneration for five years' agency.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Gratuity to Mr Poole's son for five years' agency, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Wilks for repairs in Merton Chancel
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gpt-5-mini ('Wilks' and 'Merton Chancel') is accurate, visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini's note acknowledging ambiguity for the name ('Wilks' or 'Willys') demonstrates good reasoning, while gemini-flash's reading of 'Mr. dys' and 'Morton Chancel' was incorrect.
rows.english_description: Payment to Wilks for repairs carried out in Merton chancel.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Wilks for repairs in Merton chancel, amounting to £2 1s 4d.

rows.description: - Mr. Cornish for Chancel Windows at G. Newton
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms a dash leading the description, 'Mr. Cornish' and 'G. Newton'. For the amount, the pounds column clearly shows a ditto mark ('"'), indicating zero pounds, as correctly interpreted by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini's reading of '1' pound is incorrect. Shillings and pence are 1 and 6, confirmed by both.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Cornish for work on chancel windows at G. Newton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Cornish for chancel windows at G. Newton, amounting to £0 1s 6d.

rows.description: - Costing for repairs at Campsfield Farm
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gemini-flash ('- Costing for repairs at Campsfield Farm') is accurate, confirmed by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini's reading of 'Gosling' and 'Campfield' is incorrect.
rows.english_description: Costs incurred for repairs at Campsfield Farm.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Costing for repairs at Campsfield Farm, amounting to £3 10s 0d.

rows.description: Bills Allowed to Faulkner for draining & planting, & Stable Matters
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gemini-flash ('Bills Allowed... Stable Matters') is more accurate, with 'Allowed' capitalized and 'Stable Matters' (not 'stable rafters'), confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Bills allowed to Faulkner for draining, planting, and stable-related work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bills allowed to Faulkner for draining, planting, and stable matters, amounting to £20 4s 8d.

rows.description: To the Heirs of the late H. H. Jamson on acct of his bill
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description required visual correction: 'Heirs' is clearly visible (not 'Hors' or 'fees'). The name 'H. H. Jamson' and 'on acct of his bill' are also clearly visible, matching gemini-flash's reading more closely than gpt-5-mini's 'W. H. Taunton on acct of his Will'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the heirs of the late H. H. Jamson on account of his outstanding bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the heirs of the late H. H. Jamson on account of his bill, amounting to £150 0s 0d.

rows.description: - Mr. Black for Inspection & arrangement of ancient Documents in the Archives
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gemini-flash ('- Mr. Black... Documents') is more accurate regarding the starting dash and capitalization of 'Documents', confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Black for inspecting and arranging ancient documents in the archives.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Black for inspection and arrangement of ancient documents in the archives, amounting to £18 18s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr Spranger one 2d Scholarship
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gpt-5-mini ('Mr Spranger one 2d Scholarship') is accurate, confirmed by visual inspection. gemini-flash's reading of 'Spnanger' and '7th' is incorrect.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Spranger of a second scholarship.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Spranger of one second scholarship, amounting to £40 0s 0d.

rows.description: - Mr. Woolley Do Do
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gemini-flash ('- Mr. Woolley Do Do') is accurate, confirmed by visual inspection, including the leading dash and 'Mr.'. gpt-5-mini's reading of 'W. Woolley' is incorrect.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Woolley of a second scholarship (same as the payment to Mr Spranger).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Woolley of one second scholarship, amounting to £40 0s 0d.

rows.description: Subscription to the augmentation of Small Benefices
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gemini-flash ('Small Benefices') is more accurate on capitalization. gpt-5-mini correctly noted that the line is struck through in the ledger, which is an important contextual observation.
rows.english_description: Subscription paid towards the augmentation fund for small benefices.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription to the augmentation of small benefices, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.description: Expenses of a Journey from Leatherhead to Waldron, for inspection of the latter
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate regarding capitalization of 'Journey' and the comma after 'Waldron', confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Travel expenses from Leatherhead to Waldron incurred for inspection of the Waldron property.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses of a journey from Leatherhead to Waldron for inspection, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Lightfoot, Expenses of the Progress at L. Field £16.8.6, & elsewhere £9.19.0
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms the written amount is 26.4.6. The note from gemini-flash is exemplary, identifying the discrepancy between the written amount and the sum of internal figures, and correctly extracting the written amount as per instructions. gpt-5-mini incorrectly reads the shillings as '7' and appears to have calculated the sum rather than extracting the ledger's actual value. Description from gemini-flash is also more accurate ('Mr.', 'Progress', 'L. Field', punctuation).
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Lightfoot for expenses of the progress at L. Field and for other journeys.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Lightfoot for expenses of the progress at L. Field (£16 8s 6d) and elsewhere (£9 19s 0d), amounting in total to £26 4s 6d.

rows.description: Two Powers of Attorney for sale of Stock from Dr. Richards & Dr. Shortridge's Funds
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate regarding capitalization of 'Stock' and the period after 'Dr.', confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Costs for two powers of attorney required for the sale of stock from Dr Richards's and Dr Shortridge's funds.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Cost of two powers of attorney for sale of stock from Dr Richards's and Dr Shortridge's funds, amounting to £2 3s 0d.

rows.description: To Mr. Cornish one year's Inkom 200l. for the Augmentation of S. Newington
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus and visually verified. Description from gemini-flash ('Mr. Cornish one year's Inkom 200l. for the Augmentation of S. Newington') is accurate, confirmed by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini's reading of '(Union 200l)' is incorrect, despite its honest assessment of ambiguity in its notes.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Cornish representing one year's income on £200 for the augmentation of South Newington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Cornish of one year's income (on £200) for the augmentation of South Newington, amounting to £8 0s 0d.
